flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sarah Lawrence College rose 59% between 2017 and 2020 ($17.0k → $27.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sarah Lawrence College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($36.1k → $42.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sarah Lawrence College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.5k → $66.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Sarah Lawrence College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (67.4% → 59.2%).
